productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Cap
description: This knit beanie from united colors of benetton makes a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. Designed to offer snug comfort, this beanie is a great way to beat the chill and enjoy those long winter walks.Made of 90% acrylic and 10% lana wool Nearly seamless stitching for abrasion-free comfortRibbed hem for style and comfortCrochet design for enhanced styleCareHand wash in warm water and line dryDo not dry clean, bleach, wring Cool iron
